name: tasks
description: Task CRUD, assignment, and completion. Notifies users on assignment and status changes.

exports.updateTask: (token: string, taskId: string, input: UpdateTaskInput) => TaskWithAssignee
exports.assignTask: (token: string, taskId: string, assigneeId: string) => TaskWithAssignee
exports.deleteTask: (token: string, taskId: string) => void — requires admin

types.CreateTaskInput: { title, description?, priority?: TaskPriority, assigneeId?, projectId, dueDate? }
types.UpdateTaskInput: { title?, description?, priority?, status?: TaskStatus, assigneeId?, dueDate? }
